name: Bard
description: A support caster who turns the tide with song. Bards buff allies with battle hymn and weaken foes with discord, later learning haste and, at level 15, a dissonant chord that batters a foe and breaks their nerve, then at level 30 an anthem of renewal that steadily mends and guards the whole party, and at level 45 a driving war song that sharpens the whole party's attacks and accuracy, then at level 60 a beguiling siren song, the bard's first area attack, whose piercing refrain assails the mind of every foe in the room; they shine in a group but are fragile on their own.
